title: Opening for Production Engineer at Wavin India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Wavin India
jsonLd.description:
Wavin India has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wavin India:
Wavin India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wavin India!
